title: “EAST-WEST BRIDGE FROM ANCIENT TO THE FUTURE” International Project
content:
“EAST-WEST BRIDGE FROM ANCIENT TO THE FUTURE” International Project

Program

Presidency for Turks Abroad and Related Communities (YTB) YOUTH SUPPORT PROGRAM

Project Title

“EAST-WEST BRIDGE FROM ANCIENT TO THE FUTURE” International Project

Project Coordinator Organization (Association)

Project Partners

T. C. Üsküdar University Institute for Sufi Studies (ISS)

Kerim Education Culture and Health Foundation

Total Project Budget: 6,000 Euros

Duration: 11 Months

Project team

Project Coordinator/Association President: Dr. Instructor Member Dilek Güldütuna (Üsküdar University)

Project Manager

Deniz Willer

Dr. Edibe Nuray Saatci (Üsküdar University, PhD.)

Hasan Kerim Power (Üsküdar University, Ph.D.)

Software and Project Assistant

Project Partner Institution Representative

AIM

1. To create a common platform between Turkish youth living in Turkey and European countries

2. To create tandem learning opportunities so that young Turkish generations living in European countries do not forget, develop and use Turkish.

3. Developing communication/interaction and cooperation networks between Turkish youth living in homeland Turkey and other countries.

4. To increase the cultural accumulation of our young generation, to increase their self-confidence so that they can take part in international platforms and act more courageously in their personal talents and interests. Increasing entrepreneurship and advocacy skills

6. To give the opportunity to examine the Turkish-Islamic history and culture, which also forms the basis of Western culture, in depth.
